hyfi.config package

Configuration management for fault imaging.

This module contains configuration classes, parameter management, validation, and configuration file I/O functionality.

class hyfi.config.AutoClassConfig(autoclass_bool: bool = True, n_clusters: int = 2, algorithm: str = 'vmf_soft', rotation: bool = True)[source]

Bases: object

Configuration for automatic classification module.

algorithm: str = 'vmf_soft'
autoclass_bool: bool = True
n_clusters: int = 2
rotation: bool = True
validate()[source]

Validate configuration parameters.

exception hyfi.config.ConfigValidationError[source]

Bases: ValueError

Custom exception for configuration validation errors.

class hyfi.config.FaultNetworkConfig(n_mc: int = 1000, r_nn: float | str | None = 100.0, dt_nn: float | str | None = 26298.0, mag_type: str = 'ML', auto_optimize_parameters: bool = False, optimization_method: str = 'optuna', optimization_grid_points: int = 25, optimization_n_trials: int = 50, optimization_sampler: str = 'tpe', optimization_n_startup_trials: int = 10, optimization_early_stopping_rounds: int | None = None, optimization_early_stopping_threshold: float = 0.0001, optimization_pareto_sampler: str = 'nsga2', optimization_pareto_population: int = 50)[source]

Bases: object

Configuration for fault network reconstruction module.

auto_optimize_parameters: bool = False
dt_nn: float | str | None = 26298.0
mag_type: str = 'ML'
n_mc: int = 1000
optimization_early_stopping_rounds: int | None = None
optimization_early_stopping_threshold: float = 0.0001
optimization_grid_points: int = 25
optimization_method: str = 'optuna'
optimization_n_startup_trials: int = 10
optimization_n_trials: int = 50
optimization_pareto_population: int = 50
optimization_pareto_sampler: str = 'nsga2'
optimization_sampler: str = 'tpe'
r_nn: float | str | None = 100.0
validate()[source]

Validate configuration parameters.

class hyfi.config.ModelValidationConfig(validation_bool: bool = True, foc_file: str | Path | None = None, foc_sep: str = ';', foc_mag_check: bool = True, foc_loc_check: bool = True)[source]

Bases: object

Configuration for model validation module.

foc_file: str | Path | None = None
foc_loc_check: bool = True
foc_mag_check: bool = True
foc_sep: str = ';'
validate()[source]

Validate configuration parameters.

validation_bool: bool = True
class hyfi.config.ProjectConfig(project_title: str = 'Fault Imaging Analysis', hypo_file: str | Path = '', hypo_sep: str = '\t', out_dir: str | Path = <factory>, fault_network: FaultNetworkConfig = <factory>, model_validation: ModelValidationConfig = <factory>, auto_class: AutoClassConfig = <factory>, stress_analysis: StressAnalysisConfig = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Main configuration class containing all module configurations.

__post_init__()[source]

Convert string paths to Path objects and validate basic properties.

auto_class: AutoClassConfig
fault_network: FaultNetworkConfig
classmethod from_dict(config_dict: dict) → ProjectConfig[source]

Create ProjectConfig from dictionary (for backward compatibility).

hypo_file: str | Path = ''
hypo_sep: str = '\t'
model_validation: ModelValidationConfig
out_dir: str | Path
project_title: str = 'Fault Imaging Analysis'
stress_analysis: StressAnalysisConfig
to_dict() → dict[source]

Convert ProjectConfig to dictionary (for backward compatibility).

validate()[source]

Validate all configuration parameters.

class hyfi.config.StressAnalysisConfig(stress_bool: bool = True, S1_trend: float = 301, S1_plunge: float = 23, S3_trend: float = 43, S3_plunge: float = 26, stress_R: float = 0.35, PP: float = 0, fric_coeff: float = 0.75, use_shapefile_stress: bool = False, stress_field_shapefile: str | None = None)[source]

Bases: object

Configuration for fault stress analysis module.

PP: float = 0
S1_plunge: float = 23
S1_trend: float = 301
S3_plunge: float = 26
S3_trend: float = 43
fric_coeff: float = 0.75
stress_R: float = 0.35
stress_bool: bool = True
stress_field_shapefile: str | None = None
use_shapefile_stress: bool = False
validate()[source]

Validate configuration parameters.

hyfi.config.auto_load_config(file_path: str | Path) → HyFIWorkflowDAG | MultiSequenceConfig | ProjectConfig[source]

Automatically detect JSON file format and load configuration.

For JSON files, detects between DAG format, multi-sequence format, and legacy format.

Parameters:

file_path (Union[str, Path]) – Path to the JSON configuration file

Returns:

Loaded configuration object based on detected format

Return type:

Union[HyFIWorkflowDAG, MultiSequenceConfig, ProjectConfig]

Raises:

ConfigValidationError – If file format is not supported or file cannot be loaded

hyfi.config.convert_legacy_to_dag(legacy_config: ProjectConfig) → HyFIWorkflowDAG[source]

Convert a legacy ProjectConfig to a DAG configuration (JSON format).

Parameters:

legacy_config (ProjectConfig) – Legacy configuration to convert

Returns:

Converted DAG configuration

Return type:

HyFIWorkflowDAG

hyfi.config.create_template_config(file_path: str | Path, format: str = 'json') → None[source]

Create a template configuration file.

Parameters:

  • file_path (Union[str, Path]) – Path where to save the template

  • format (str) – File format - only ‘json’ is supported

Raises:

ConfigValidationError – If format is not supported or file cannot be written

hyfi.config.create_template_dag(file_path: str | Path, workflow_name: str = 'My HyFI Analysis', input_file: str = 'path/to/hypocenter_data.txt', output_dir: str = './hyfi_output') → HyFIWorkflowDAG[source]

Create a template DAG configuration and save it to JSON file.

Parameters:

  • file_path (Union[str, Path]) – Path where to save the template

  • workflow_name (str) – Name for the workflow

  • input_file (str) – Path to input hypocenter data file

  • output_dir (str) – Output directory for results

Returns:

Created template DAG

Return type:

HyFIWorkflowDAG

Raises:

ConfigValidationError – If file cannot be written

hyfi.config.load_config_from_json(file_path: str | Path) → ProjectConfig[source]

Load configuration from a JSON file (legacy format).

Note: For DAG configurations, use load_dag_from_json() instead.

Parameters:

file_path (Union[str, Path]) – Path to the JSON configuration file

Returns:

Loaded configuration object

Return type:

ProjectConfig

Raises:

ConfigValidationError – If file cannot be loaded or parsed

hyfi.config.load_dag_from_json(file_path: str | Path) → HyFIWorkflowDAG[source]

Load DAG configuration from a JSON file.

JSON is the only supported format for DAG configurations.

Parameters:

file_path (Union[str, Path]) – Path to the JSON DAG configuration file

Returns:

Loaded DAG configuration object

Return type:

HyFIWorkflowDAG

Raises:

ConfigValidationError – If file cannot be loaded or parsed

hyfi.config.save_config_to_json(config: ProjectConfig, file_path: str | Path) → None[source]

Save configuration to a JSON file (legacy format).

Note: For DAG configurations, use save_dag_to_json() instead.

Parameters:

  • config (ProjectConfig) – Configuration object to save

  • file_path (Union[str, Path]) – Path where to save the JSON file

Raises:

ConfigValidationError – If file cannot be written

hyfi.config.save_dag_to_json(dag: HyFIWorkflowDAG, file_path: str | Path) → None[source]

Save DAG configuration to a JSON file.

Parameters:

  • dag (HyFIWorkflowDAG) – DAG configuration object to save

  • file_path (Union[str, Path]) – Path where to save the JSON file

Raises:

ConfigValidationError – If file cannot be written

hyfi.config.validate_dag_file(file_path: str | Path) → bool[source]

Validate a DAG configuration file.

Parameters:

file_path (Union[str, Path]) – Path to the JSON DAG configuration file

Returns:

True if validation passes

Return type:

bool

Raises:

ConfigValidationError – If validation fails
